rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Est. Code §1102.003 governs information letters about incapacitated persons in guardianship proceedings. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter and operate in different code titles.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is from the Estates Code guardianship provisions and has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
